ops.title: Comment-sweep redo: held + clobbered files, after wire-v2/Pool refactor lands
ops.description: Finish the 2026-07 comment cleanup once the wire-v2/supervise-Pool/daemon-Runtime refactor is committed and the tree is clean. Scope: (1) originally-held overlap files — daemon/{ensure,errors,peer,takeover}.go+tests, drain/liveness*.go, drain/resources.go, proc/reaper*.go, service/*.go+tests, wire/{client,envelope,server}.go, wire/lifeproto/gen/{main,spec}.go; (2) files the refactor clobbered after lane patches applied — wire/{ladder,peer,peer_darwin}.go, wire/wiretest/wiretest.go, wire/lifeproto/doc.go, Sources/DaemonKit/{SnapshotWatcher,SocketServer}.swift, Tests/DaemonKitTests/{LifecycleWire,PeerTrust,SocketServer}Tests.swift; (3) the refactor's NEW files — daemon/runtime.go, supervise/pool.go, wire/{frame,session,lifecycle}.go, service/restart.go (+tests), Sources/DaemonKit/SessionTransport.swift; (4) deferred Phase 3(b): extract the duplicated Swift shortSocketDir/sendLine test helpers into Tests/DaemonKitTests/TestSupport.swift. Method: disposition rules + keep-list from ccn log b811201 attachments (keep-list entries apply where symbols survive; supervise/Subject entries are obsolete — the package was replaced); old lane patches attached there for reference. Gate: commentdiff token-equality + directive check, task build/test/lint, swift build/test, refuter pass, path-scoped ship. Records N9/N11/N13 may need drift review once the new architecture lands (they document the replaced supervise/framing designs — historical knowledge, still valid as rationale).

ops.text: all held+clobbered+new files pass the disposition rules with a green gate stack
Swift test helpers deduped into TestSupport.swift
N9/N11/N13 reviewed for drift against the landed architecture
